title: Question: How can I redefine the "VL_VPRINTF"
body:
--- Author Name: **HyungKi Jeong** Original Redmine Message: 2381 from https://www.veripool.org --- In "verilated.h". ``` #ifndef VL_PRINTF 1. define VL_PRINTF printf ///< print ala printf; may redefine if desired #endif ``` But actually there is no way to redefine this to my new 'printf' function.
:(
As like the 'vl_finish', 'vl_stop' or 'vl_fatal'.
It needs a pre-definition with 'extern'... maybe.
code_blocks:
#ifndef VL_PRINTF
1. define VL_PRINTF printf    ///< print ala printf; may redefine if desired
#endif
